topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into Device Drivers. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: Device Drivers is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing Device Drivers in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in Device Drivers
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating Device Drivers.
Fix the bug in the given Device Drivers snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of Device Drivers?
How does Device Drivers handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate Device Drivers into a microservice
Scale Device Drivers for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about Device Drivers
